title: New Glowing Ores
description: Makes ores glow to make them more visible, and also adds connected outlines to them so you don't miss a single block. Mod support available
body: [A placeholder image]: https://imgur.com/HX196SW.png ![A placeholder image] ### Dependencies: This resourcepack requires additional mods which would allow textures to glow and connect. There are a few options: - **Vanilla and Forge**: Requires **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** - **Fabric**: Requires **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** - **NeoForge**: Requires **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** and **[Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)** ### **IMPORTANT**: **Note that if you're playing with Continuity and Sodium 0.5.X and lower, you'll also need to add [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium). It's not needed for 0.6+ versions though.** This pack makes all the ores ( including raw ore blocks and ancient debris ) glow. **There are 2 different versions of it, which names and versions are different:** - Default version ( only ores glow ) - Border Version ( borders and ores glow ) ### Mod Support: If you use Border version, you **need Conitnuity**, it won't work with **Optifine**! | Mod |Border **[Continuity only]**|Default| |--------------------------------------------------------------------|:-----:|:-----:| | [Werewolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/werewolves) | ✅ | ✅ | | [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) | ✅ | ✅ | | [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) | ✅ | ❌ | | [Infernal Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/infernal-expansion) | ❌ | ✅ | | [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) | ❌ | ✅ | | [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) | ❌ | ✅ | Note: Resource pack works on basically any version higher than 1.17 in case the dependency mods are present, don't worry if it says that this pack is incompatible for this version.
